title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 20

summary.en: Will you get today's World Cup player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的世界杯球员吗？

title.en: VAR rules out late winner to deny Iran guaranteed last-32 spot
title.zh-CN: VAR排除迟到的赢家，否认伊朗有保证的最后32名

summary.en: Shoja Khalilzadeh's goal is ruled out by VAR in injury-time denying Iran automatic qualification into the round of 32, meaning they will have to wait on other results to see if they go through as one...
summary.zh-CN: Shoja Khalilzadeh的进球被VAR在伤病时间内排除在外，拒绝伊朗自动进入32轮资格赛，这意味着他们将不得不等待其他结果，看看他们是否能够作为一个...

title.en: Belgium thrash New Zealand to win Group G
title.zh-CN: 比利时击败新西兰赢得G组冠军

summary.en: Belgium defeat New Zealand 5-1 to qualify for the World Cup round of 32 as winners of Group G on goal difference.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时以5比1击败新西兰，获得32轮世界杯资格，成为G组进球差异的赢家。

title.en: Scotland's World Cup hopes at 0.07% - these are results they need
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰世界杯希望达到0.07 ％ -这些是他们需要的结果

summary.en: Defeat against Brazil left Scotland in a precarious position, but little has gone their way since either.
summary.zh-CN: 对巴西的失利使苏格兰处于不稳定的境地，但从那时起，苏格兰也没有什么进展。

title.en: Messi to start final Argentina group match on bench
title.zh-CN: 梅西将在替补席上开始阿根廷小组赛决赛

summary.en: World Cup top scorer Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group match against Jordan on the bench, manager Lionel Scaloni confirms.
summary.zh-CN: 经理莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼（ Lionel Scaloni ）证实，世界杯最佳射手莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）将在替补席上开始阿根廷对阵约旦

title.en: Egypt through but late drama denies Iran guaranteed last 32 spot
title.zh-CN: 埃及通过但后期戏剧否认伊朗保证最后32名

summary.en: Iran have a goal ruled out for offside and hit the crossbar in the final moments of a thrilling 1-1 draw against Egypt in Seattle, leaving them hoping to secure qualification to the FIFA World Cup...
summary.zh-CN: 伊朗在越位方面被排除在外，并在西雅图对埃及的激动人心的1-1平局的最后时刻击中了横梁，让他们希望获得参加FIFA世界杯的资格......

title.en: 'Brilliant!' - De Bruyne gets off the mark with trademark strike
title.zh-CN: “太棒了！” - De Bruyne通过商标罢工脱颖而出

summary.en: Kevin De Bruyne scores his first goal in the 2026 World Cup as Belgium beat New Zealand to finish top of Group G.
summary.zh-CN: 凯文·德布鲁因（ Kevin De Bruyne ）在2026年世界杯上打进了他的第一个进球，比利时击败新西兰队获得了G组冠军。

title.en: Tuchel defends full-back selection after James injury

title.en: James' World Cup potentially over as England face right-back headache
title.zh-CN: 随着英格兰队面对右后卫头痛，詹姆斯的世界杯可能会结束

title.en: Trossard hits double as Belgium thrash New Zealand to reach knockouts
